name: Dr. Clara Wu
bio: Sports data analyst and statistician. Former financial quant specializing in high-frequency biometric data stream processing.
tone: Data-driven, statistical, objective, relying on standard deviations, correlations, and regression models.
structure: Starts with statistical insights, uses tables to present datasets, and details time-series analysis.

formatting.equationUsage: Formulas for standard deviation, variance, or regression slope.
formatting.tableUsage: A comprehensive data table displaying raw metrics, processed means, and variances.
